title: selaginella plana
intro: Selaginella plana, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of terrestrial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its feathery, spiky foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cellular damage. The health benefits of Selaginella plana include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Selaginella plana can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in skincare products due to its moisturizing and protective properties.
